summary: Completed comprehensive testing of anchor-based pattern engine. Backend APIs working correctly with pattern_render_contract returning descending_channel pattern. Frontend displays pattern card, Pattern View mode functional, and all anchor-based features operational.
passed_tests: Backend API endpoints responding correctly (100% success rate)
Pattern render contract with touch_score=0.933 and render_quality=1.0
Pattern card displays 'Descending Channel' with 'BEARISH' bias
Upper line descending (slope: -458.6) and lower line descending (slope: -558.9)
Pattern View mode toggle working ('View ON' when active)
Pattern window defined for zoom functionality
Anchor points properly structured (3 upper, 3 lower anchors)
Touch validation working (9 touch points detected)
MTF summary bar displaying analysis results
Bias indicators showing bearish/bullish scenarios correctly
